title: Analytics Center
subtitle: Technical analysis, fundamentals, and quantitative dashboards

empty.tech: No technical analysis data yet. Open a symbol in Market Data to start exploring.

custom.inProgress: Custom dashboard builder is in progress.
custom.supports: Supports charts, tables, KPIs, and custom indicators.

tech.title: Choose a symbol to start analyzing
tech.explanation: Technical studies become useful after you pick a symbol in Market Data and load the latest candles.
tech.helper: Next step: choose a symbol, then come back to compare momentum, trend, and volatility.

fundamental.title: This symbol does not have analysis data yet
fundamental.explanation: When raw fields or derived metrics are missing, the safest next step is to check sync health and data-source coverage first.
fundamental.helper: Once the relevant source catches up, valuation, factor, and financial panels become more meaningful.

quant.title: Run a backtest before reading analytics
quant.explanation: Quant metrics become far more useful once you have a first backtest result to benchmark against.
quant.helper: One completed backtest is enough to unlock win-rate, drawdown, and return-quality analysis.
